label: Source HubDB table
name: source_table
help_text: Use a table of people, clients, names, or media outlets. Rows can include a related logo/source row, or stand alone for logo-only sliders.

label: HubDB query
name: hubdb_query
help_text: Optional HubDB query string, for example orderBy=sort_order&limit=12. Leave blank to use all table rows.

label: Item limit
name: max_items
help_text: Only used when Items to show is set to Limit items.

children.label: Primary detail column
children.name: primary_detail
children.help_text: Optional title, role, client, or descriptor column on each primary row.

children.label: Primary URL column
children.name: primary_url
children.help_text: Optional URL column on each primary row.

children.label: Related source column
children.name: related_source
children.help_text: Optional relation column for a client, media outlet, logo, or other source row.

children.label: Related source name column
children.name: related_source_name
children.help_text: Name column on the related source row.

children.label: Related source logo column
children.name: related_source_logo
children.help_text: Logo or image column on the related source row.

children.label: Related source URL column
children.name: related_source_url
children.help_text: Optional URL column on the related source row.
